# Skella & Co

> The independent practice of Jamie Skella. Emerging technology strategy, holistic experience design, and go-to-market consultancy for the agentic era.

Skella & Co helps organisations decide which systems to deploy, what they should optimise for, and who operates them. Jamie is a World Economic Forum Technology Pioneer Award winner with twenty years of product and experience leadership across AMD, Western Digital, Telstra, AAMI, AFL, and venture-backed startups. Based in South Australia, working globally.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://skella.com.au/): Summary of practice, credentials, and contact.
- [About (Markdown)](https://skella.com.au/about.md): Machine-readable practice summary.
- [About (Japanese)](https://skella.com.au/about.ja.md): Machine-readable Japanese summary.
- [Japanese home page](https://skella.com.au/ja/): Japanese version of the home page.
- [Writing](https://skella.com.au/writing/): Essays on agentic systems and emerging technology.
- [RSS feed](https://skella.com.au/feed.xml): Subscribe to new writing.

## Contact

Email is revealed on click at [skella.com.au](https://skella.com.au/). Jamie is also on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamieskella/), [GitHub](https://github.com/jamieskella), and [X](https://x.com/jamieskella).

## Also built

Side projects now running quietly: [Arbiio](https://arbiio.com.au/), [Crayon Dreaming](https://crayondreaming.com/), and [WC Calendar](https://wccalendar.com/).

## Policies

- [Privacy](https://skella.com.au/privacy/): Cookieless analytics, no tracking, Australian Privacy Principles compliant.
- [Terms](https://skella.com.au/terms/): Plain language, personal site.
